metadata.name: The Dragon of Hargorn
metadata.author: hyperbolic
metadata.description: A thousand years ago the Conclave of Suns bound the dragon Hargorn beneath the western sea, sealing the realm with three Sealstones. Now one of their own — Vorkhaal the Inverted — has fed on those wards to extend his life, and the first seal he broke has woken the dragon. The coast burns nightly. The dead will not stay buried. Recover the Sun Sword from the drowned shrine, gather the binding rite from Vorkhaal's coven, and end Hargorn before its long shadow swallows the realm.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Thorndale
towns.description: A fortified settlement perched on a rocky bluff overlooking the valley.

key_dungeons.name: Rotting Barrow
key_dungeons.description: The air around Rotting Barrow shimmers with faint heat. Strange runes glow along the doorframe.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Descend into Rotting Barrow and find the Iron Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The passage grows more treacherous with every floor.
